name: Democrats.org
subject: Stand with Chuck Schumer and Senate Democrats against health care repeal
body:
We need your help to save affordable health care. **We've seen the Senate GOP's secret bill, so we launched a new ad to hold Republicans accountable on health care.

Chip in $10 or whatever you can to help us keep it on the air and keep getting the word out about the GOP's health care repeal:

**[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523330/4067b0a/357d6f91e/7e68c8bc/191931788/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Health-Care-Ad1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170625_dnc2_rem&source=em_20170625_dnc2_rem&refcode=em_20170625_dnc2_rem")****
[](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523330/4067b0a/357d6f91e/7e68c843/191931788/VEsHBg/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Health-Care-Ad1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=13&utm_campaign=em_20170625_dnc2_rem&source=em_20170625_dnc2_rem&refcode=em_20170625_dnc2_rem") [](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523330/4067b0a/357d6f91e/7e68c840/191931788/VEsHAQ/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Health-Care-Ad1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=14&utm_campaign=em_20170625_dnc2_rem&source=em_20170625_dnc2_rem&refcode=em_20170625_dnc2_rem") [](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523330/4067b0a/357d6f91e/7e68c841/191931788/VEsHAA/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Health-Care-Ad1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=15&utm_campaign=em_20170625_dnc2_rem&source=em_20170625_dnc2_rem&refcode=em_20170625_dnc2_rem") [](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523330/4067b0a/357d6f91e/7e68c84e/191931788/VEsHAw/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Health-Care-Ad1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=16&utm_campaign=em_20170625_dnc2_rem&source=em_20170625_dnc2_rem&refcode=em_20170625_dnc2_rem")

Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523330/4067b0a/357d6f91e/7e68c856/191931788/VEsEAQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=24+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170625_dnc2_rem&source=em_20170625_dnc2_rem&refcode=em_20170625_dnc2_rem"). This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523330/4067b0a/357d6f91e/7e68c854/191931788/VEsEAw/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=26+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170625_dnc2_rem&source=em_20170625_dnc2_rem&refcode=em_20170625_dnc2_rem"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Team Maggie
subject: Will you help protect health care?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdeeb/2a380d31/186283c9/feaa3a/2933270275/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdeeb/2a380d31/186283c9/feaa3a/2933270275/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Bumping this email, because this is important --
Senate Republicans' version of Trumpcare gives enormous tax breaks to corporate special interests, all while defunding Planned Parenthood and undermining protections for people with pre-existing conditions.
And, it guts Medicaid -- a program that helps older Americans, pregnant women, and those living with disabilities get the care they need.
**Mitch McConnell knows that hard-working Americans like you will be hit hard by what 's in the bill, so he's trying to push it through as quickly as he can, without giving you a chance to read it. **
_There 's even talk about bringing it to a vote this week._
[**We 're running out of time, so add your name to tell Senate Republicans NOT to pass Trumpcare.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdeeb/2a380d31/186283c9/feaa3b/2933270275/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/tankthebill/?code=hassan&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F201706_senate_healthcare")
Thank you,
Team Maggie
_\-----------Original Message-----------_
On Thursday, June 22 at 3:26 PM, Team Maggie
<info@maggiehassan.com> wrote:
Team, we just got a first look at the bill Senate Republicans have been working on in secret, and it's even worse than we expected.
It defunds Planned Parenthood, makes even more cuts to Medicaid than the House bill, and undermines essential health benefits including maternity and prescription drug coverage.
In short, it would rip lifesaving care away from millions of our families, friends, and neighbors.
[**Add your name to tell the Senate NOT to pass this cruel bill and to protect access to the health care coverage millions of Americans rely on.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdeeb/2a380d31/186283c9/feaa3b/2933270275/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/tankthebill/?code=hassan&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F201706_senate_healthcare")
We won't mince words: this bill would discriminate against women by allowing insurance companies to charge them more for their care, it would drive up premiums and out of pocket costs, and it would unfairly tax older Americans.
We can still stop this bill from passing the Senate, but only if each and every one of us step up to the plate.
**Team, the time to act is NOW.[Please, sign the petition and let the Senate know that you do NOT support this horrendous health care plan.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdeeb/2a380d31/186283c9/feaa3b/2933270275/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/tankthebill/?code=hassan&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F201706_senate_healthcare")**
Lives are on the line here, everyone, so thank you for taking action.
-- Team Maggie

[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdeeb/2a380d31/186283c9/feaa24/2933270275/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxNzA2X3NlbmF0ZV9oZWFsdGhjYXJlIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxNzA2MjVfU2VuYXRlSGVhbHRoSkEta1JTX2FjdCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/201706_senate_healthcare?refcode=e20170625_SenateHealthJA-kRS_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdeeb/2a380d31/186283c9/feaa25/2933270275/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Maggie for NH

Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible.

Maggie for NH
PO Box 298
Concord, NH 03302 United States

**

name: Larry Cohen, OurRevolution.com
subject: NAFTA has hollowed out the middle class
body:
#
Friends,

NAFTA renegotiation is approaching quickly. It is more important than ever that we stand together and remain vigilant. If we don't, we run the risk of seeing just another gift to corporations at the expense of working class families all over the North American continent, increasing our already inexcusable levels income inequality.
Join us this Tuesday as we stand together at a hearing hosted by US Trade Representative Robert Lighthizer. We will deliver more than 100,000 petition signatures and more than 50,000 comments. Standing together as we deliver will let those renegotiating NAFTA know that we are watching. Your presence is critical to let them know that working class families must be heard in this renegotiation.
**ReplaceNAFTA Petition Delivery
Tuesday, June 27
8:15am - 9:15am
US International Trade Commission
500 E St SW, Washington, DC 20024**
****[RSVP](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0dd4/43f17890/cac9ecff/62035497/266369352/VEsH/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/event/detail/volunteeractivityormeeting/gpg5mb")****
Trade deals can be good for our economy, our workers, and the workers in our trading partners. Whether you can make it to the event tomorrow or not, we can fight to make NAFTA the trade deal it should be: one where workers are treated fairly, the environment is treated with respect, and corporations play by our rules, not their own.
**Add your name to the more than 100,000 whose voices will be delivered this Tuesday - calling on US Trade Representative Lighthizer to give us a better NAFTA.**
****[Sign the Petition](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0dd4/43f17890/cac9ecff/62035494/266369352/VEsE/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/nafta-petition")****
For decades I have been honored to join my brothers and sisters in the labor, environmental and social justice movement movement in the fight against poorly negotiated trade deals. I hope I can count on you to join us for this extremely important action.
In Solidarity,
Larry Cohen
PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
603 2ND ST, NE
WASHINGTON, DC, 20002

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0dd4/43f17890/cac9ecff/62035495/266369352/VEsF/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123 "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0dd4/43f17890/cac9ecff/62035492/266369352/VEsC/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0dd4/43f17890/cac9ecff/62035493/266369352/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").

name: Debbie
subject: We lose jobs, we lose money, and we lose coverage
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
Sign to tell the Senate: STOP the Republican health care plan >>
| |
---
| |
---
| Friend,

President Trump and Republicans have said that their health care plan is good for businesses and good for America.

**Except, it 's not.**

According to a George Washington University study, in Florida alone, the Republican health care plan would result in **83,000 fewer jobs and $8.6 billion in lost revenue.** Services for seniors, persons with disabilities, and those in need of in-home care would be jeopardized. The uninsured rate amongst children would skyrocket. Premiums would increase and millions across the nation will lose their care.

[_**And for what? To give a tax break to the wealthiest Americans.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ec3/622b7b5b/3ffc10b/307bc587/1817791528/VEsH/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/tankthebill/?code=dws&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fdwse170621ja%3Frecurring%3Dtrue%26amount%3D5")

[_**Sign your name and tell the Senate to stop the Republican health care plan.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ec3/622b7b5b/3ffc10b/307bc587/1817791528/VEsE/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/tankthebill/?code=dws&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fdwse170621ja%3Frecurring%3Dtrue%26amount%3D5")

To sum up the Republican health care plan: we lose jobs, we lose money, and we lose coverage.

_That is the reason their plan is being written in secret behind closed doors._

From coast to coast, nearly one million jobs could be lost as a result of their plan. With families paying more in premiums under this plan, and facing medical bankruptcies, economic consumption and growth will take a blow resulting in even more lost jobs. And that doesn't even take into account the millions that will lose coverage and the millions more that will being paying more for less care. **The Republican health plan is bad for jobs, bad for our economy, and bad for America.**

And Republicans are closer than ever to passing it into law.

[_**Don 't let this ill-conceived plan become a reality for millions of Americans. Tell the Senate: STOP the Republican health care plan.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ec3/622b7b5b/3ffc10b/307bc587/1817791528/VEsF/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/tankthebill/?code=dws&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fdwse170621ja%3Frecurring%3Dtrue%26amount%3D5")

Thank you,

Debbie |
Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[Click here](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ec3/622b7b5b/3ffc10b/307bc586/1817791528/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://www.debbiewassermanschultz.com/subscriptions/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") to unsubscribe
---

name: staff@maggiehassan.com
subject: 🎥 VIDEO: This fight is personal 🎥
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdee9/2a380d31/1853180b/feaabf/1266742454/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdee9/2a380d31/1853180b/feaabf/1266742454/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Have you seen this video, everyone?
The fight to protect access to affordable health care and Medicaid is a personal one for Senator Hassan, just like it is for so many of us.
She sat down with NowThis to talk about her son Ben, who experiences severe disabilities, and the importance of ensuring that every family has the health coverage that they need.
[**Watch the video here:**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdee9/2a380d31/1853180b/feaab8/1266742454/VEsF/ "http://twitter.com/nowthisnews/status/876583560643092481")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdee9/2a380d31/1853180b/feaab9/1266742454/VEsC/ "https://twitter.com/nowthisnews/status/876583560643092481")

Medicaid covers in-home care, school nursing services, and other medical support that has helped Ben and people like him live at home and learn and make friends at school.
Now, Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans are trying to ram through Trumpcare, a bill that would rip that coverage away from millions of Americans.
Senator Hassan is working her heart out to stop the bill and make sure that families across the country continue to have access to that same support and care.
[**Watch the video to learn more about this and the other ways that Trumpcare would devastate hard-working families.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdee9/2a380d31/1853180b/feaab8/1266742454/VEsD/ "http://twitter.com/nowthisnews/status/876583560643092481")
Thanks for watching,
Team Maggie

[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdee9/2a380d31/1853180b/feaaba/1266742454/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxNzA2X3NlbmF0ZV9oZWFsdGhjYXJlIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxNzA2MjVfTm93VGhpc19hY3QtbmgiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/201706_senate_healthcare?refcode=e20170625_NowThis_act-nh&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdee9/2a380d31/1853180b/feaabb/1266742454/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Maggie for NH

Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible.

Maggie for NH
PO Box 298
Concord, NH 03302 United States

name: Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand (via DSCC.org)
subject: Demand that the Senate reject Trumpcare (add your name)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Senate Republicans just released the text of their new health care bill, and it's a nightmare.
---
**[](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e47d/2b07114c/266309c3/73103d32/2755634077/VEsH/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/stop-trumpcare-fast-track?source=PT-20170625-Gillibrand-ProsHV")**
Friends --

Senate Republicans just released the text of their new health care bill, and it's a nightmare.

Their plan could raise costs for seniors and people with preexisting conditions, defund Planned Parenthood and make even deeper cuts to Medicaid than those passed by the House. And now, they're trying to force us to vote as soon as next week with almost no debate!

This fight isn't over. We've stopped President Trump's dangerous agenda before, and we can stop it again -- but I need you to stand with me and Senate Democrats right now.

**Will you add your name to demand the Senate reject Trumpcare? Here 's the link:**

[**http://www.dscc.org/reject-Trumpcare-now**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e47d/2b07114c/266309c3/73103d2d/2755634077/VEsE/ "http://secure.dscc.org/page/s/stop-trumpcare-fast-track?source=PT-20170625-Gillibrand-ProsHV")

Thanks,

Kirsten
